---
# Impair defenses (disable Microsoft Defender)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

Catch AV-tampering: command lines with `Set-MpPreference` / `DisableRealtimeMonitoring` (PowerShell Defender disable) or `sc.exe ... windefend` (stop the service). Defender being disabled by an interactive or scripted process — not by patch management — is a strong T1562.001 signal that usually immediately precedes payload execution. Extend with `Add-MpPreference ... ExclusionPath` to catch exclusion-folder abuse.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS and (actor_process_command_line contains "Set-MpPreference" or actor_process_command_line contains "DisableRealtimeMonitoring" or (actor_process_image_name = "sc.exe" and actor_process_command_line contains "windefend"))
| fields _time, actor_process_image_name, actor_process_command_line, causality_actor_process_image_name
```

_Query syntax live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (narrow 30-min window). Adapt thresholds + the `contains`/`in` sets to your environment; filter early to keep the scan cheap._
